message:
feat(output): convert remaining simple commands to Output abstraction

Continue migration from println!/colored crate to Output/rich_rust:
- Convert cmd_doctor JSON/Toon output
- Convert cmd_benchmark output
- Convert cmd_robot_docs output
- Convert cmd_export output
- Fix variable shadowing with output parameter

Reduce println! calls from 75 to 67 (8 more conversions)

Remaining 67 calls are in complex box-drawing functions (print_quickstart,
print_import_welcome) that require careful handling of text width measurement
with console::measure_text_width when using ANSI-styled text.

Total progress: 277 -> 67 println! calls (210 conversions, ~76% complete)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
